description.value: Price 200 gp DETAILS Type poison , injury; Save Fortitude DC 16; Onset 1 round; Frequency 1/round for 6 rounds; Cure 1 save EFFECTS The subject’s mind goes fuzzy, shifting its attitudes toward all other creatures one step closer to indifferent and DCs to influence the subject with Charisma , Diplomacy , Handle Animal , or Intimidate checks increase by 4.
